name: GOLFTEC Memphis
about: GOLFTEC Memphis is a golf training studio focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The facility utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide detailed feedback on swings and club performance. Coaching services are central to their offering, with certified PGA instructors creating personalized improvement plans for students of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION and launch monitor technology
Comprehensive club fitting services to optimize equipment

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use equipment provided during your lesson or fitting. For fittings, the studio provides a Shaft Wall and various club options to help you find the perfect fit.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC does not have an on-site food and beverage service. It is recommended to eat before your session or bring your own water.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole simulator session typically takes approximately 2 to 2.5 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is kid-friendly and offers programs for juniors and youth. Their technology, like high-speed video and launch monitors, is used to simplify complex swing concepts for young players.
